prompt.content:
Using the Redwood_BankTransactions in Xero and the PLN FX 2022 exchange rate file, calculate the total USD-equivalent cash receipts for FY2022. Include all RECEIVE transactions. Convert non-USD transactions to USD using the PLN cross-rate on the nearest prior business day (PLN per foreign currency divided by PLN per USD). Present as a dollar amount rounded to two decimal places.

Assumptions:
FY2022 is the calendar year January 1 through December 31, 2022
RECEIVE transactions only
For non-USD transactions, use the closest available date on or before the transaction date from the PLN FX 2022 file
Cross-rate formula: (PLN per foreign currency) / (PLN per USD) = USD per foreign currency

rubrics.name: States the total USD-equivalent cash receipts for FY2022 is $5,924,104.68... (ver_8749da1d9da44db6af624438cf802767)

messages.content: States the total USD-equivalent cash receipts for FY2022 is $5,924,104.68 (acceptable range $5,924,103.68 to $5,924,105.68).
